stemHtml:
In what type of aeronautical publication will the following information, published on the 29th September 2016, be published?

A nest of eight lit tower cranes will be operating within 0.087 NM of 513001N 0000139E, to a maximum height of 279 ft AGL/295ft AMSL until 31 December 2016. A lit tower crane will be operating in the vicinity of London City Airport, position 513243N 0000028W (Stratford), to a maximum height of 614 ft AGL/630ft AMSL until 31 March 2017.
Two lit tower cranes will be operating in the vicinity of London City Airport, position 512940N 0000403E (Woolwich Riverside), to a maximum height of 308 ft AGL/324 ft AMSL until 1 February 2019.
